'''Hexum'Baz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who served under [[Sebolto]]'s employ during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He was wanted [[Death/Legends|dead]] by an anonymous person for unknown reasons. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the person being quoted said that he just wanted the "worthless" Dug dead. His bounty was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Behind the scenes==
For some reason the [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] labels his bounty as worth 3,000 alive (when he's worth the same price dead) and 1,500 dead.

*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
